creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 152087
New proposed patch (since 372709 revision)

Returned value of DISTNAME to "tenr.de-styles-${PORTVERSION}" for consistency purposes with previous version. This also returns some portlint warning about hypen in PORTNAME, which could be ignored. The distinfo is re-generated.

If someone has access to http://freebsd.unixfreunde.de/sources/fluxthemes/ directory it could upload created distfile, then MASTER_SITES might be returned also. Perhaps, this is Martin Wilke (miwi@), the creator of port (which is not active for ports, currently).
